title: Just Normal Foxes
description: Just adds new models for foxes
body:
### Made by SR400X

###

## Optifine Required
![Just Normal Foxes Thumbnail.](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2023/528/16692266-just-normal-foxes_l.webp)


## Description:

The texture pack changes the texture and model of the fox to a better and new look
